title: phelypaea mutelii subsp. nana
intro: Phelypaea mutelii subsp. nana, also known as Phelypaea nana, is a subspecies of the Phelypaea mutelii plant, which is a small, annual or biennial succulent native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their high concentration of alkaloids. The health benefits of Phelypaea mutelii subsp. nana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. Phelypaea mutelii subsp. nana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal purposes, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
